audit_items.proof_trace: The only write to s_auctionStarts[asset] (non-delete) is line 353: `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp`, which is exactly what the invariant requires. The guard at line 327 reverts with LiveAuction() if s_auctionStarts[asset] is already non-zero, preventing any stale or duplicate assignment. The invariant holds by construction for every eligible non-assetOut asset started in performUpkeep.
